name: G-2 source-organized file format: fetch_frequency must be one of daily | weekly | monthly | quarterly | on-demand per the §2.21 enum
command:
printf 'source:
  id: test-src
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://e.t/d
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
  content_hash: "sha256:abc"
  fetch_frequency: hourly
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: "MIT"
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > sf.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-source-file.sh" "$PWD/sf.yaml" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'fetch_frequency' err.txt && echo enum_enforced 1>&2
